heading: Assistance to certain candidate countries
label: 7715 Assistance to certain candidate countries

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Board, acting through the Chief Executive Officer, is authorized to provide assistance to a candidate country described in subsection (b) for the purpose of assisting such country to become an eligible country.
satisfies the requirements contained in ; andsection 7705(a) of this title
demonstrates a significant commitment to meet the requirements of but fails to meet such requirements (including by reason of the absence or unreliability of data).section 7706(b) of this title

children.heading: Administration
children.label: c Administration
children.text: Assistance under this section may be provided through the United States Agency for International Development.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 1 Limitation
children.text: Not more than 10 percent of the amounts made available to carry out this chapter for a fiscal year may be made available to carry out this section.

children.heading: Restriction relating to assistance
children.label: 2 Restriction relating to assistance
children.text: None of the funds authorized to carry out the purposes of this chapter shall be available for assistance under this section to a country that does not qualify as a candidate country under for the fiscal year during which such assistance is provided.section 7705 of this title
